title: Big Mom’s Broken Memory
description: On pages 15–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Big Mom as Big Mom’s past explains the emotional weakness that the assassination plan tries to exploit.
scene: Big Mom’s childhood reveals the loss and confusion behind her obsession with Mother Carmel.

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom
dialogue.text: Linlin's destroyed the village of Elbaf!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom
dialogue.text: You've finally gone and done it, Linlin.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You have no right to even be thankful to the sun!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's a limit to how much we can forgive, even for a child.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: caramel, my apologies. But this one is no child.

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Tea Party storyline with 18 dialogue beats. Big Mom’s past reframes her weakness and the emotional core of the failed assassination plan.
